description.en_US: Homebridge is a lightweight NodeJS server you can run on your home network that emulates the iOS HomeKit API. It supports Plugins, which are community-contributed modules that provide a basic bridge from HomeKit to various 3rd-party APIs provided by manufacturers of "smart home" devices.
description.zh_CN: Homebridge是一个轻量级的NodeJS服务器，您可以在家庭网络中运行它，模拟iOS HomeKit API。它支持插件，这是由社区贡献的模块，提供了从HomeKit到各种由“智能家居”设备制造商提供的第三方API的基本桥梁。

tagline.zh_CN: HomeKit 为急性子提供支持
